targets.query: SELECT min("instant") AS "Low", max("instant") AS "High" FROM "framerate" WHERE ("server" =~ /$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "server" fill(none)

SELECT mode("ping") AS "Latency" FROM "connection_latency" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/ AND "steamid" =~ /^${steamid:raw}$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval), "ip", "steamid", "server" fill(none)
SELECT mode("fps") FROM "client_performance" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/ AND "steamid" =~ /^${steamid:raw}$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "steamid", "server" fill(none)
SELECT mode("memory") FROM "client_performance" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/ AND "steamid" =~ /^${steamid:raw}$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "server", "steamid" fill(none)

SELECT mode("bytes_received")  / 1024 / 1024 * 8 AS "Rx", mode("bytes_sent")  / 1024 / 1024 * 8 AS "Tx" FROM "network" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "server" fill(none)
SELECT mode("packet_loss") AS "Packet Loss" FROM "network" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval), "server" fill(none)

SELECT sum("packet_loss") AS "Packet Loss" FROM "connection_latency" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/ AND "steamid" =~ /^${steamid:raw}$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval), "ip", "steamid", "server" fill(none)

SELECT mode("allocations") AS "Allocations", derivative(mode("collections"), 5m)  * 100 AS "GC Pressure", mode("used") AS "Memory Usage" FROM "memory" WHERE ("server" =~ /$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "server" fill(none)
SELECT mode("count") AS "Total Count" FROM "entities" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "server" fill(none)
SELECT sum("duration") AS "Duration" FROM "work_queue" WHERE ("server" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "server", "behaviour", "method" fill(0)
